functional.description: Establish a stable WebSocket or Supabase Realtime connection between backend and dashboard.
Ensure metric updates flow with < 100ms latency (p95).
Implement automatic reconnection with exponential backoff.
Prevent memory leaks in subscription and cleanup logic.
Define and document a versioned message format.
Implement error handling for network/timeout/invalid message scenarios.
Support reactive UI updates in the dashboard frontend.
Verify that real-time data matches the database source of truth.

nonFunctional.description: Authenticate connections via JWT and enforce RLS policies.

constraints.description: Use Supabase Realtime (recommended) or custom WebSocket.
constraints.impact: Decides technology stack for data flow.

assumptions.description: Story 3.1 is completed and dashboard is accessible.

domainModel.description: Stream of agent metrics and system status.

interactions.description: User opens dashboard -> Subscribes to channels -> UI updates on DB change.

edgeCases.scenario: Network partition between backend and Supabase.
edgeCases.handling: Buffer messages or warn user of stale data.

terminology.definition: Elixir-based broadcasting service for PostgreSQL changes.
